name: ATEM to TS3019
description: Portable description of the ATEM Program/Preview variable sync workflow for AVMATRIX TS3019 lamps.

mapping.inputToLamp: ATEM input N maps to TS3019 lamp N

triggerGroups.condition: ATEM ME1 Program source for input N becomes true
triggerGroups.action: TS3019 Sync all lamps from Program/Preview variables

triggerGroups.condition: ATEM ME1 Program source for input N becomes false
triggerGroups.action: TS3019 Sync all lamps from Program/Preview variables

triggerGroups.condition: ATEM ME1 Preview source for input N becomes true
triggerGroups.action: TS3019 Sync all lamps from Program/Preview variables

triggerGroups.condition: ATEM ME1 Preview source for input N becomes false
triggerGroups.action: TS3019 Sync all lamps from Program/Preview variables
TS3019 Sync all lamps from Program/Preview variables
